TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to do that.
NOT_ASSIGNED_TO_YOU: This item is not assigned to you.
DEVICE_REVOKED: This device has been revoked. Contact your dispatcher.
RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
VALIDATION_FAILED: Some of the information you sent is not valid.
SYNC_BATCH_TOO_LARGE: Too many changes in one sync. Split into smaller batches.
SYNC_FIELD_WINS: Your delivery was recorded. The office had reassigned this job while you were offline, but what happened in the field stands.
SYNC_SERVER_WINS: This job was {{status}} by the office before your change arrived. Your change was not applied.
SYNC_MERGED: Synced. The office changed other details while you were offline; both changes were kept.
SYNC_ESCALATED: This needs a dispatcher to review — your change and the office's change conflict.
SYNC_ILLEGAL_TRANSITION: You cannot move this job from {{from}} to {{to}}.
SYNC_INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Not enough stock in your van for this order.
CASH_RECONCILE_DUE: You have {{amount}} IQD to hand in.
